Petition For Order Appointing Successor Trustee
Off Calendar Aug-17-2021 Granted Per Written Order
MINI MINUTES:

Appearances: Justin Hedemark and Alison Neri appeared by zoom for Laura Brockwehl (Petitioner).

The Court stated that it will appoint Laura Brockwehl as the Successor Trustee with a zero bond at this time and that it if any funds are distributed to the trust, the Trustee must petition for a bond. The Petition for Order Appointing Successor Trustee is under submission with the Court's intent to grant the petition.

Judge: Vedica Puri. Probate Examiner: Sandy Hilton. Clerk: Rosie Noguera. Deputy: R. Rosado. Not reported.
